summary: Build KD Platform on Internet Computer (ICP) with Internet Identity auth, idempotent user seeding, and admin-only user management; expand into KD.WebAI NOC v13.0 “Singularity Protocol” package including a multi-canister backend (sovereign core/RBAC, ICRC-1 token, vault, AI status, DAO voting, treasury status, ZK solvency proofs) plus frontend dashboard/admin UI and deployment scripts/config.
architectural_notes: Target platform is Internet Computer (ICP) using Motoko canisters + Internet Identity authentication.
Use idempotent canister initialization/seeding to avoid Day-0 empty dashboard state on fresh deployments.
Admin authorization enforced via caller Principal (RBAC) for write methods (add/remove user, treasury actions).
Multi-canister architecture: sovereign core (users/RBAC), token (ICRC-1), vault, AI, DAO, treasury, ZK proofs; frontend served as assets canister.

existing_features.title: Create a new React route under the existing app (e.g., /kd-platform/noc) that renders a NOC dashboard page with cards/sections for: AI Status, Treasury Metrics (including TVL string), DAO Proposals (list + vote buttons), ZK Root display + “Generate Solvency Proof” action, Omni-mesh status indicator, and Universal Launch overlay trigger. All user-facing text must be English.

Add React Query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to support the NOC dashboard: getAIStatus, getTreasuryStatus, getDaoProposals, voteOnProposal, getZkCurrentRoot, generateZkSolvencyProof, getOmniMeshStatus, and startUniversalLaunch (or equivalent). Hooks must use the existing useActor hook and follow current queryKey/invalidation patterns.

Add an admin-only “NOC Admin” section within the NOC page that allows: (1) adding/removing a user by Principal (principal text input), and (2) toggling universal launch / black-hole mode state (if implemented). This section must only render when the caller is an admin as determined by the backend.

Port the provided NOC UI components into the existing React+Tailwind app as new components (do not use standalone HTML pages): ComplianceShield, InstitutionalConsole, and UniversalLaunchOverlay. Update any unsupported dependencies (e.g., undefined getNOCActor or fetch('/api/...')) to use the existing actor + React Query hooks instead.
Add a navigation entry to reach the new NOC route from the existing site navigation (desktop and mobile) without modifying any immutable frontend paths. Keep existing KD Platform routes intact.

Add project configuration and documentation updates to reflect an ICP-native deployment (dfx-based) rather than Vercel/Node proxy routes: provide/update a README section describing how to deploy the single backend canister and the frontend, and how to verify NOC endpoints using dfx canister call. Do not add Vercel-only deployment steps.

new_feature_requests.summary: ICP Motoko backend for KD Platform: idempotent initialization (Day-0 seeded admin user) and persistent user count/state across upgrades
Admin-only user management in canister (addUser/removeUser with Principal-based RBAC + isAdmin query)
Frontend KD dashboard on ICP assets canister: users metric cards (Total Users), authenticated via Internet Identity with clear sign-in guard UX
Frontend admin panel: add/remove user by Principal, plus basic treasury controls UI hooks (allocate/mint) gated to admins
KD.WebAI NOC v13.0 multi-canister backend modules: vault engine, ICRC-1 token canister, AI status canister, DAO proposals/voting, treasury status, ZK-solvency proof layer
Project scaffolding + deployment/config: dfx.json canister set, env template, security headers, deploy.sh and controller-handover (black hole mode) scripts

Implement an ICP-native “NOC” domain in the existing Motoko single-actor canister (backend/main.mo) that provides: (1) AI status query, (2) DAO proposals query + vote update, (3) Treasury status query, (4) ZK solvency proof generation + current root query, (5) Omni-mesh status query, and (6) a “universal launch” state toggle. All new public methods must be reachable via the existing frontend actor/declarations flow (no separate canisters, no REST-only endpoints).

Add persistent, upgrade-safe NOC state in the backend (stable storage) for: AIStatus, TreasuryStatus, DAO proposal list + vote counts, ZK current root + last proof time, omni-mesh status, and universal launch/black-hole mode flags. If any current in-memory vars would be lost on upgrade, add a conditional backend/migration.mo to preserve/transform state without breaking existing data.

Implement principal-based RBAC and user registry functions in the existing backend to mirror the NOC “Sovereign Core (RBAC)” intent: support an admin principal (configured via initialization), register caller, admin-only addUser/removeUser by Principal, getUserCount, getUser(principal), and isAdmin(principal). These must be additive and must not remove or break existing AccessControl/Users-based functionality already used by the current KD dashboard.
